fragment:
<set-variable name="requestedModel" value="@{
        try
        {
            var method = context.Request.Method;

            // GET and DELETE requests are non-LLM operations (listing models, deleting responses)
            if (method.Equals("GET", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                method.Equals("DELETE", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return "non-llm-request";
            }
            
            // 1. Try deployment-id path parameter (Azure OpenAI named operations)
            var deploymentId = context.Request.MatchedParameters.ContainsKey("deployment-id") 
                ? context.Request.MatchedParameters["deployment-id"] 
                : null;
            
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deploymentId))
            {
                return deploymentId;
            }
            
            var path = context.Request.Url.Path;
            
            // 2. Try extracting model from URL path /deployments/{model}/...
            //    Handles AOAI wildcards and Unified AI /openai/deployments/{model}/chat/completions
            var deploymentsSegment = "/deployments/";
            var idx = path.IndexOf(deploymentsSegment, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (idx >= 0)
            {
                var afterSegment = path.Substring(idx + deploymentsSegment.Length);
                var slashPos = afterSegment.IndexOf('/');
                var modelName = slashPos >= 0 ? afterSegment.Substring(0, slashPos) : afterSegment;
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(modelName))
                {
                    return modelName;
                }
            }
            
            // 3. Try AWS Bedrock native Converse/Invoke pattern: /model/{modelId}/{operation}
            //    Singular "/model/" (vs "/models/") disambiguates from Gemini.
            //    modelId may contain ':', '.' (e.g. eu.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0) or '/'
            //    (inference-profile ARNs, e.g.
            //    arn:aws:bedrock:eu-north-1:123:inference-profile/eu.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0).
            //    Even when the client percent-encodes '/' as %2F, APIM decodes it back to '/'
            //    in Url.Path, so IndexOf('/') would truncate the ARN. The Bedrock operation
            //    suffix (converse|converse-stream|invoke|invoke-with-response-stream) is
            //    always the LAST path segment, so split on the LAST '/' instead.
            var modelSegment = "/model/";
            idx = path.IndexOf(modelSegment, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (idx >= 0)
            {
                var afterSegment = path.Substring(idx + modelSegment.Length);
                var slashPos = afterSegment.LastIndexOf('/');
                var modelName = slashPos > 0 ? afterSegment.Substring(0, slashPos) : afterSegment;
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(modelName))
                {
                    return System.Net.WebUtility.UrlDecode(modelName);
                }
            }
            
            // 4. Try Gemini native pattern: /models/{modelId}:method (e.g. /v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash:generateContent)
            //    Plural "/models/" with ':' terminator disambiguates from /deployments/{model}/.
            var modelsSegment = "/models/";
            idx = path.IndexOf(modelsSegment, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (idx >= 0)
            {
                var afterSegment = path.Substring(idx + modelsSegment.Length);
                var colonPos = afterSegment.IndexOf(':');
                if (colonPos > 0)
                {
                    var modelName = afterSegment.Substring(0, colonPos);
                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(modelName))
                    {
                        return System.Net.WebUtility.UrlDecode(modelName);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 5. Try request body "model" field (OpenAI-compat / Anthropic Messages / Inference)
            var bodyText = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(bodyText))
            {
                return string.Empty;
            }
            
            var body = JObject.Parse(bodyText);
            return body["model"] != null ? body["model"].ToString() : string.Empty;
        }
        catch
        {
            return string.Empty;
        }
    }" />
    
    
    
        
            
        
        
            
            
                
                
                    application/json
                
                @{
                    return new JObject(
                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                            new JProperty("message", "Model could not be detected from request body or path"),
                            new JProperty("type", "invalid_request_error"),
                            new JProperty("code", "missing_model_parameter"),
                            new JProperty("param", "model")
                        ))
                    ).ToString();
                }
